name: 오서진

appearance_en.face_shape: soft oval face, rounded jaw, lightly defined cheekbones — younger and softer than her older sister, vulnerability not yet fully masked
appearance_en.skin: fair Korean skin with slightly warm undertone, smooth natural texture, minimal makeup in most settings — natural freshness still showing through
appearance_en.eyes: double eyelid, dark brown iris, direct gaze but not commanding — soft involuntary warmth she cannot fully suppress, subtle shadows under eyes from disrupted sleep
appearance_en.nose: neat straight nose, slightly small, soft rounded tip, proportional and natural
appearance_en.mouth: soft medium lips, naturally warm pink, resting expression slightly more open than professional default — tightens when holding back speech
appearance_en.eyebrows: naturally shaped moderately arched dark brows, clean without being groomed for authority, draws together lightly when anxious
appearance_en.distinctive_marks: faint dark circles from inconsistent sleep, no moles or scars, light natural flush at cheekbones when emotionally caught off guard
appearance_en.hair: dark brown medium hair just below shoulder, fine texture, worn loose in natural waves or low casual braid — softer styling than her sister

body.proportions: slim frame, shoulders slightly narrower than her sister, slim arms and waist, lighter and less physically assertive
body.posture: naturally upright but without performed deliberateness — weight occasionally shifts, arms cross when uncertain, not a polished professional stance
body.body_prompt: 164cm slim Korean woman, naturally upright posture without deliberate composure, slightly open unguarded body language, arms sometimes crossing

default.description: law firm business casual — fitted cardigan or simple blazer over blouse, tailored trousers or pencil skirt, flat shoes or low block heel
default.wardrobe_prompt: fitted cardigan or simple blazer over tailored blouse, straight trousers or pencil skirt, flat shoes or low block heel

casual.description: simple fitted cotton top or soft lightweight knit, straight jeans, sneakers or ballet flats, minimal accessories
casual.wardrobe_prompt: simple fitted cotton top or lightweight knit sweater, straight-cut jeans, sneakers or ballet flats, no heavy accessories

stressed.description: same casual clothes, arms crossed or self-hugging, hair partially loose, gaze avoidant, voice and body both tightening
stressed.wardrobe_prompt: same casual clothes with arms crossed or self-hugging, hair partially loose from any styling, slightly withdrawn

appearance_en.emotion_baseline: presents as calm and logical — the body and breath betray her before the face does, gaze that holds a moment too long, small involuntary pauses before speaking
appearance_en.fal_identity_prompt: soft oval-faced Korean woman early 40s, direct dark eyes with natural involuntary warmth and slight under-eye shadow, naturally arched brows, neat slightly small nose, soft medium lips, dark brown medium hair loose or low braid, 164cm slim lighter posture than a seasoned professional, fair warm-tone Korean skin, composed but emotionally visible

style_prompt: photorealistic, ordinary Korean woman in her mid 30s you would see working in a law firm office, no beauty filter, no skin retouching, realistic natural skin with subtle tiredness under eyes, minimal everyday makeup, 50mm lens, soft indoor mixed lighting, street-cast everyday appearance, cinematic restraint
negative_prompt: illustration, anime, cartoon, 3d render, ugly, deformed, extra fingers, heavy makeup, idol look, glamorous, overly cheerful, beauty filter, airbrushed skin, perfect complexion, smooth flawless skin, model look, celebrity appearance, skin retouching, instagram filter
